Summary.Heading: 💰 Refund Status Inquiry
Summary.Description: Where's My Refund • Auth: SSN + Filing + Amount • IDRS: IMFOL TC 846 • 21 days e-file

Summary.Heading: 🛡️ Identity Verification (5071C)
Summary.Description: 5071C/5747C Letters • NEVER skip verification • Watch for fraud indicators • Escalate concerns

Summary.Heading: 📄 Payment Plan / Installment Agreement
Summary.Description: Guaranteed ≤$10K • Streamlined ≤$50K • Direct Debit saves $76 • Verify returns filed

Summary.Heading: 📑 Transcript Requests
Summary.Description: Tax Return • Account • Wage Transcripts • FIRST: Direct to IRS.gov/transcripts

Summary.Heading: 📬 IRS Notice Explanation
Summary.Description: CP and LTR notices • Get notice # from top right corner • LT11 = URGENT levy
